privileged_info_summary: The task instructions and target verification states were independently confirmed by analyzing the task description and scripts. The target coordinates (34.0° N, 18.0° E) successfully translate to the verification radians (0.5934, 0.3142). The required UI flags (landscape disabled, azimuthal grid enabled, constellation drawing enabled) and expected stars (Sirius, Polaris, Capella) match the explicit scoring logic in the verifier. The output paths for the briefing document and screenshots match the setup and export shell scripts.
